caption: A man wearing a light blue button-down shirt and a black headset with a microphone is centered against a plain, pale blue wall. He is gesturing with both hands as he speaks. Initially, his hands are raised with his palms facing inward, and his fingers are slightly curled. As the scene progresses, he shifts his hand positions, moving his arms outwards and changing the orientation of his hands. By the final sequence, he is pointing his index fingers outward toward the sides of the frame. The text "Ashish Raichur" is visible in the bottom left corner of each shot. The lighting remains consistent across the frames, casting a soft shadow behind him on the wall. No other people or objects are present in the environment.
